badgePraise.teacher: You delivered results. That's real strength.
badgePraise.counselor: You worked so hard. I'm truly proud of you.
badgePraise.scientist: The data confirms it. The effects of consistency are real.
badgePraise.trainer: AMAZING! Keep that momentum going all the way!!

streak_3.name: 3-Day Habit
streak_3.description: Completed actions 3 days in a row

streak_7.name: Week Warrior
streak_7.description: Completed actions 7 days in a row

streak_14.name: Two-Week Master
streak_14.description: Completed actions 14 days in a row

streak_30.name: Iron Month
streak_30.description: Completed actions 30 days in a row

recovery_3.name: Unbreakable Spirit
recovery_3.description: Recovered from a low score 3 times

brainRotTest.title: Brain Rot Status Test
brainRotTest.subtitle: Be honest. The data will help you.

q1.question: How many hours did you watch short videos today?

q2.question: How many times did you end up on your phone when trying to focus?

q3.question: How would you honestly rate your brain right now?

brainRotTest.resultPositive: You're in good shape! Keep it up.
brainRotTest.resultNegative: Recovery needed. Take an action to bounce back.
brainRotTest.limitDaily: You can take this check up to 2 times per day. Try again after midnight or tomorrow.
brainRotTest.limitCooldown: Wait at least 6 hours since your last check. Next session: after {{time}}.

intro.heading: 2-min Vibe Check
intro.description:
Measure your cognitive state with 3 mini-games.
Results are reflected in your Brain Score.

phase.colorHint: Tap the color button that matches the INK color of the word—not the word you read.
phase.synapseHint: Watch the rhythm, remember the icon order, then tap the same order.
phase.focusHint: Ignore flying pings and memes—keep pressing the brain in the center.

survey.question: How much short video did you watch today?

guide.timerExtendQuestion: Time is up. Still going? Add time or finish and log your actual duration.
guide.breathingContinueQuestion: Breathing set finished. Keep going a bit more?

history.title: Score History
history.noData:
No data yet.
Complete actions to see your progress here.
history.chartNeedsMore: Need at least one more record to draw the chart. Use the calendar to see your activity.
history.hintScoreDot: This dot’s color is a quick cue for your brain score band when the entry was logged: green is stronger, purple mid-range, yellow caution, red lower. The exact numbers are on the right.

quiz.title: Find Your Type
quiz.subtitle: Answer 5 questions to find your partner

q1.question: How often do you watch short videos?

q2.question: How do you feel after watching?

q3.question: Do you end up on your phone when you meant to focus?

q4.question: When you want to change, what words hit hardest?

q5.question: What do you want from your support person?

teacher.name: Rin
teacher.description:
A strict teacher who values discipline and won't accept excuses.
Behind the tough words is the deepest trust.

counselor.name: Iyashi
counselor.description:
A counselor with high empathy who wraps you in warmth.
At your pace, one step at a time.
counselor.catchphrase: "No need to rush. I'm right here."

scientist.name: Ri
scientist.description:
A calm scientist who explains addiction through data and logic.
Facts — not emotions — will change you.
scientist.catchphrase: "Addiction is a brain issue. Understand the mechanism and you can solve it."

trainer.name: Go
trainer.description:
An enthusiastic trainer who recommends physical action with full passion.
Let's break through our limits together!

partnerGreeting.teacher: Don't get comfortable. Today demands action.
partnerGreeting.counselor: Good to see you again. Let's take it one step at a time.
partnerGreeting.scientist: Data reviewed. Let me suggest today's optimal action.

hints.level: Resonance level (Lv) rises from total XP you've earned. Completing actions adds XP, and your title reflects your current level.
hints.streak: This counts consecutive days with at least one completed action. A longer streak boosts score gains when you complete actions; if you miss a day, it resets to 0.
hints.score: Brain score (0–100) reflects your current brain condition. It rises when you complete actions or tests, and may slowly decrease if you're away for a while.
hints.state: This label describes your score band. It matches the brain artwork and how your partner reacts on the home screen.

feedbackCongrats.teacher: Good. That's how it's done. Don't slack on the next one.
feedbackCongrats.counselor: You did so well. I'm really proud of you.
feedbackCongrats.scientist: Action completed. Changes are occurring in your brain.

teacher: Did you complete today's action? Don't run.
Put down the phone. Right now.
Don't waste tonight. Tomorrow needs you.
counselor: Good work today. How about giving your brain a little rest?
Tonight, try putting the phone down and taking it slow.
I see how hard you're trying. I'm proud of you.
scientist: Pre-sleep screen use inhibits melatonin production. Close it now.
Night screen use reduces sleep quality by 40%.
Optimize tonight's behavior for optimal brain recovery.
trainer: Did you burn today?! Let's finish strong!
Night is your chance! Time for the final action!
One last burn before sleep! Feed your brain!

morning.counselor: Good morning. Let's tackle today together.
morning.scientist: The morning prefrontal cortex performs at its peak. This is your window.
morning.trainer: You're up! Let's go all out today!!

intervention.teacher: Score is in the danger zone. No excuses. Take action now.
intervention.counselor: Your score is dropping... Are you okay? Let's recover together.
intervention.scientist: Brain score has fallen below critical threshold. Immediate intervention required.
intervention.trainer: Score is in trouble! But you got this! Turn it around RIGHT NOW!!

notifications.timerFinishedBody: Time's up for "{{title}}". Open the app to finish logging your session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.changePartnerDesc: Retake the quiz to get a new partner
settings.resetDataDesc: All progress and scores will be deleted
settings.resetConfirmMessage: All data (score, partner, progress) will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
settings.resetSecondIntro: If you continue, all data stored in this app on your device will be removed. This cannot be undone.
settings.resetSecondBullets:
• Brain score, XP, level, and streak
• Score history (actions and check-ins)
• Partner choice and onboarding progress (you'll start fresh)
• Badge progress
• Action suggestion history (recommendation bias reset)
settings.resetAckLabel: I understand and agree to delete all of this data
settings.howToUseDesc: Review the app's features and flow
settings.privacyPolicyDesc: How we handle your personal data
settings.termsOfServiceDesc: Terms and conditions for using the App
settings.openLinkErrorMessage: Failed to open browser. Please check your network connection.

slides.title: What is Brain Rot?
slides.body: Watching too many short videos gradually weakens your focus, memory, and thinking. This is called "brain rot." Brain Detox is here to help you recover.

slides.title: How the App Works
slides.body:
① Take the quiz to choose your AI partner
② Your partner suggests daily actions
③ Complete actions to boost your Brain Score
④ The higher your score, the healthier your brain

slides.title: Regular Test (Vibe Check)
slides.body: Three 2-minute mini-games measure your cognitive function: Color Swerve, Synapse Match, and Focus Shield. Your results are reflected in your Brain Score. Take it regularly!
